summary: The case describes persistent lateness with underestimation of routine task durations, pre-departure disorganization, and negative self-evaluation. The proposed modifiable BIO/PSYCHO/SOCIAL levers span cognitive offloading, planning skills, sleep and arousal, environmental design, habit formation, self-compassion, and social accountability. Each lever targets specific operational criteria (C01-C06) and emphasizes practical, replaceable predictors with measurable outcomes. The plan includes multi-domain interventions with feasible implementation, a clear mechanism for expected change, and a 4–12 week horizon to observe meaningful shifts in punctuality, task duration estimates, organization, and self-perception while minimizing risk.

solutions.predictor_variable: Pre-departure checklist + auto-added buffer time (e.g., 20–30 minutes) to calendar events, with door/entrance reminders
solutions.solution_candidate: External cognitive load reduction via pre-departure checklists and calendar buffers
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Externalizes planning and adds time margin to accommodate variability in task duration; reduces risk of missed steps and supports reliable departure states.
solutions.measurement: Proportion of events on time; average buffer utilized per event; reduction in time-estimation error; frequency of items missing at departure
solutions.mapping_query: Mapping for S01: C01/C03/C04/C05 indicators; evaluate weekly adherence to checklist and buffer use.

solutions.predictor_variable: Time estimation training + planning skills via CBT-based scheduling module with practice tasks and feedback
solutions.solution_candidate: Psychoeducational time estimation and planning skills training
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Improves accuracy of duration estimates and planning, reducing underestimation and enabling reliable pacing for departures.
solutions.measurement: Mean error between estimated vs actual task durations; percentage adherence to planned start times; lateness rate
solutions.mapping_query: Mapping for S02: C02, with spillover to C03/C04/C01 through improved planning.

solutions.predictor_variable: Sleep regularization and circadian alignment: fixed bed/wake times, light exposure management, caffeine timing
solutions.solution_candidate: Sleep optimization for executive function and self-regulation
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Improved sleep supports daytime attention, flexibility, and mood; reduces lateness, duration variability, and negative self-evaluation.
solutions.measurement: Average nightly sleep duration; bedtime/wake-time consistency; timing of awakenings; daily mood ratings; lateness frequency
solutions.mapping_query: Mapping for S03: C01/C05/C06 impacted by sleep quality.

solutions.predictor_variable: Organized pre-departure station: labeled pockets for keys/phone/wallet/clothes, with a dedicated cue-based prep area
solutions.solution_candidate: Pre-departure essential-item organization and cue-based preparation
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Reduces time spent searching for essentials and scaffolds a reliable routine prior to departure.
solutions.measurement: Frequency of items found immediately; minutes spent searching; lateness rate

solutions.predictor_variable: Self-compassion training and cognitive reframing to reduce self-criticism (daily micro-practices; thought logs)
solutions.solution_candidate: Self-compassion and cognitive restructuring to reduce negative self-evaluation
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Decreases shame and rumination after lateness, fostering resilience and willingness to engage in other strategies.
solutions.measurement: Daily self-criticism scores; mood ratings; frequency of ruminative thoughts
solutions.safety_notes: Monitor for mood shifts; escalate if depressive symptoms worsen.

solutions.predictor_variable: Habit-based pre-departure routine: 60-second cue-based sequence (gather items, outfit, keys), tracked with a simple checklist
solutions.mechanism_rationale: A repeatable cue-driven sequence reduces variability and improves predictability of departure.
solutions.measurement: Adherence to routine; lateness rate; time saved per departure

solutions.predictor_variable: Environmental design: minimize interruptions via a dedicated quiet workspace and notification controls
solutions.solution_candidate: Environment optimization to reduce disruptions and improve flow
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Fewer interruptions lowers cognitive load and speeds task transitions; supports more consistent task durations and punctuality.
solutions.measurement: Number of interruptions per work period; time-on-task reliability; lateness frequency

solutions.predictor_variable: Digital time-tracking tools with automated prompts and external clocking to calibrate duration estimates
solutions.solution_candidate: Digital time-tracking and reminder system to calibrate duration estimates
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Objective feedback on durations provides corrective information to adjust estimates and pacing; supports better planning and fewer delays.
solutions.measurement: Estimation error across tasks; on-time rate; buffer usage

solutions.predictor_variable: Accountability partner or coach check-ins (weekly) to review punctuality and strategy use
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Social reinforcement and external accountability increase commitment and reduce self-criticism through supportive feedback.
solutions.measurement: Number of commitments fulfilled; perceived accountability; lateness frequency
